languages.text: "Беги к своим командирам, солдат, пускай они готовят встречу, подобающую Вольному Торговцу".
"Run along now, soldier. Tell your commanders to prepare a welcome befitting a Rogue Trader."
languages.original_text: "Беги к своим командирам, солдат, пускай они готовят встречу, подобающую Вольному Торговцу".

traits.locale_text: "Get to your commanders, soldier. Tell them to prepare a welcome befitting a Rogue Trader."
"Get to your commanders, soldier. Tell them to prepare a welcome befitting a Rogue Trader."
"Get to your commanders, soldier. Tell them to prepare a welcome befitting a Rogue Trader."
"Get to your commanders, soldier. Tell them to prepare a welcome befitting a Rogue Trader."
"Run along now, soldier. Tell your commanders to prepare a welcome befitting a Rogue Trader."

languages.text: "Geht jetzt, Soldat. Sagt Euren Kommandeuren, sie sollen einen Empfang vorbereiten, der {mf|eines Freihändlers|einer Freihändlerin} würdig ist."
languages.original_text: "Run along now, soldier. Tell your commanders to prepare a welcome befitting a Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: "Geht jetzt, Soldat. Sagt Euren Kommandeuren, sie sollen einen Empfang vorbereiten, der {mf|eines Freihändlers|einer Freihändlerin} würdig ist."

languages.text: « En route, soldat. Allez dire à vos commandants de préparer un comité d'accueil digne d'{mf|un libre-marchand|une libre-marchande}. »
languages.original_text: "Run along now, soldier. Tell your commanders to prepare a welcome befitting a Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: « En route, soldat. Allez dire à vos commandants de préparer un comité d'accueil digne d'{mf|un libre-marchand|une libre-marchande}. »

languages.text: «Rápido, soldado. Diga a sus comandantes que preparen una bienvenida digna de un{mf||a} Comerciante Independiente».
languages.original_text: "Run along now, soldier. Tell your commanders to prepare a welcome befitting a Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: «Rápido, soldado. Diga a sus comandantes que preparen una bienvenida digna de un{mf||a} Comerciante Independiente».

languages.text: "Gidebilirsin asker. Komutanlarının, bir Hür Tacir'e yaraşır bir karşılama hazırlamalarını söyle."
languages.original_text: "Run along now, soldier. Tell your commanders to prepare a welcome befitting a Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: "Gidebilirsin asker. Komutanlarının, bir Hür Tacir'e yaraşır bir karşılama hazırlamalarını söyle."

languages.text: “去通报你们的指挥官，士兵。告诉他们，准备好符合行商浪人身份的欢迎仪式。”
languages.original_text: "Run along now, soldier. Tell your commanders to prepare a welcome befitting a Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: “去通报你们的指挥官，士兵。告诉他们，准备好符合行商浪人身份的欢迎仪式。”

languages.text: 「兵士、指揮官に連絡して、ローグトレーダーにふさわしい歓迎の準備をさせるように伝えてくれ。」
languages.original_text: "Get to your commanders, soldier. Tell them to prepare a welcome befitting a Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: 「兵士、指揮官に連絡して、ローグトレーダーにふさわしい歓迎の準備をさせるように伝えてくれ。」
